presets.name: Stable Hierarchical Triple + Planet
presets.description: Two close stars, one distant third star, planet orbiting the barycenter.

presets.name: Equilateral Triple (Chaotic)
presets.description: Three equal-mass stars in near-equilateral configuration (typically unstable/chaotic).

presets.name: Tight Triple + Close Planet (Highly Unstable)
presets.description: All stars close together with a nearby planet — strong interactions and ejections likely.

presets.name: Wide Triple + Distant Planet (Stable)
presets.description: Widely separated stars with a distant planet — more stable configuration.

presets.name: Binary + Distant Third Star + Planet
presets.description: Classic hierarchical system: tight binary, distant tertiary, planet orbiting outer system.
